question:
How often should you check the tires on a placarded trailer that has dual tires?
1) Once every three hours
2) Every time you stop
3) Once every 100 miles
4) At the start of each trip and every time you stop
canonical_answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: At the start of each trip and every time you stop
